zh.East Bridgeford, Nottinghamshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfrey Ragsdale I於大約1615年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Lord John Ragsdale41歲，母親Mary Heathcote41歲。他於大約1635年與Mary Cookney在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1644年4月18日在美國維吉尼亞州亨利可亨利可 庫迪 庫豪斯享年30歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godfrey Ragsdale I于大约1615年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Lord John Ragsdale41岁，母亲Mary Heathcote41岁。他于大约1635年与Mary Cookney在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1644年4月18日在美国弗吉尼亚州亨利可亨利可 庫迪 庫豪斯享年30岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

nameMeanings.name: Ragsdale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name from Ragdale (Leicestershire). The placename appears to derive from Old English hraca ‘throat, gulley, narrow pass’ (genitive hracan) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’. From the 16th century onward the more common form of the surname is Ragsdale with an intrusive -s-.

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Godfrey Ragsdale I was born about 1615, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Lord John Ragsdale, was 41 and his mother, Mary Heathcote, was 41. He married Mary Cookney about 1635, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 18 April 1644, in Henrico County Courthouse, Henrico, Virginia, United States, at the age of 30, and was buried in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfrey Ragsdale I est né environ 1615, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord John Ragsdale, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mary Heathcote, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Mary Cookney environ 1635, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1644, à Henrico County Courthouse, Henrico, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfrey Ragsdale I um 1615 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John Ragsdale 41 und seine Mutter Mary Heathcote 41. Er hat um 1635 in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America Mary Cookney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 18. April 1644 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Henrico County Courthouse, Henrico, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Godfrey Ragsdale Iが約1615年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord John Ragsdaleは41歳，母Mary Heathcoteは41歳であった。約1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコでMary Cookneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1644年4月18日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ヘンリコヘンリコ コウントイ コウルソウゼで30歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfrey Ragsdale I(이)가 대략 1615년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John Ragsdale(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Heathcote(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1635년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Mary Cookney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1644년 4월 18일 미국 버지니아 주 헨리코 헨리코 카운티 쿠르토우스에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godfrey Ragsdale I nasceu aproximadamente 1615, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John Ragsdale, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mary Heathcote, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Cookney aproximadamente 1635, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1644, em Henrico County Courthouse, Henrico, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfrey Ragsdale I родился около 1615 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord John Ragsdale было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Heathcote, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Cookney около 1635 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 18 апреля 1644 г. в местности хенрику коунти коуртоус, хенрику, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Mary Cookney aproximadamente 1635, en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
